message:
fix: validation consistency and phase navigation improvements

HypothesisIntake.tsx:
- Use trim() consistently in canProceed check to match validation logic
- Prevents confusing UX where Next button is enabled but validation fails

hypothesis.ts:
- Use trimmed length consistently for all validation checks
- Better error messages showing trimmed character counts

SessionDashboard.tsx:
- Switch from deprecated updateSession to usePhaseNavigation hook
- Use proper navigation actions (prev, next, goTo) that persist to storage

hypothesis-lifecycle.ts:
- Add REACTIVATE transition to dormant state
- Fix RESUME action to not incorrectly set parentVersion
